Okay, so this is the high ticket script. Looks like this, and there's a lot of steps here. I'm not our sales person. We did a whole, literally we did a, I don't know, probably 20 hours of training in our high ticket secrets course that goes through this, but this is kind of it. It's a two set script. First is the first person that calls is, what we call our setter, and their job is to find out if the person's gonna be good for our coaching program. So they basically call a person up, they introduce themselves, they ask them a bunch of questions about them, about their business. They go through the blast, which is kind of this process, kind of show a bunch of stuff. What's happening, what, you know, like we're blasting through a bunch of, what's the right, I can't think of the top, the right word on top of my head. Kind of what's happening and why this is exciting, and kind of answering, they've asked a bunch, you've asked a bunch of questions, you're kind of sharing like why, what you have to share, and what your coaching program has is gonna be awesome. Then you got a posture, why yours is better or different or whatever. Then you probe to find out more about their pain, what they're struggling with, the good things, the bad things. You gotta find out if they've got credit, they can pay for it, you find out what their goals are, and then you share it with them, the commitments. Okay, so that's the first person's job, the setter is to go through that process with them and find out if they're qualified. If they are qualified, at the end of that, then they pass them to the closer. The closer is gonna go through the four commitments here. The first one is time, do you have the time to do it? Number two, are you the decision maker? Can you make decisions? Are you gonna be successful with the thing? Number three, do you have the resources you need? Number four is the knowledge. That's kind of what we're gonna be doing in the coaching program. Here's what's included, and then you sign them up and you close them. So again, there's a lot of psychology behind this, a lot more to do, but if you want more information on how to do the two step, that's where our high ticket secrets product is, but that's how we sell our eight, our 15, our 25, and our million dollar packages is through that exact process, and it works amazingly well.
